Author: Sylf
Name: Macro Recorded
Description: A crafting macro recorder plugin.
Punchline: Records a crafting rotation and export it as a macro.
Changelog: - Updated API 14

Author: pupwife
Name: Dispeller
Description: Analyze your Glamour Dresser for shared models!
Punchline: Easily clean out your Glamour Dresser.

Author: NeNeppie
Name: Avant-Garde
Description:
This plugin is a crowdsourced project, aiming to provide a comprehensive list for all hint categories.
See the github page for information on how you can contribute.
Punchline: Displays a list of valid gear pieces beside hints in the Fashion Report minigame.

Author: keifufu
Name: Facade
Description: Visually change the exterior appearance of any house so it's no longer an eyesore. (Note: Changes reset upon entering the plot to restore intended collission)
Punchline: Change your neighbours' housing exterior appearance.

Author: Tischel
Name: NOTED
Description:
允许对特定副本创建笔记（只会在对应副本中显示）。
你也可以将笔记关联至某个职业，它将会在你使用这一职业时显示。
Punchline: 副本小抄
Changelog:
1.7.0.0

- Added support for Patch 7.4 and Dalamud API 14.

Author: perchbird
Name: PrefPro
Description:
你的角色是你创造的，所以你有权让NPC们用你希望的方式与你的角色交流。这个插件可以提供让你在NPC与你进行角色性别有关的对话时改变性别的选项，比如让NPC称你的烧0角色为猛1，反之亦然。另外，部分对话中你还可以设置NPC要以姓还是名称呼你的角色（国服应该不支持）
注意：本插件不能修改带配音的过场对话
Punchline: 更改游戏内对话为你想要的性别和名称。

Author: hunter2_, originally by Eisenhuth
Name: Big Nael Quotes
Description: Dalamud Plugin that Makes Nael quotes more visible.
Punchline: Makes Nael quotes more visible.
Changelog: Update for api14

Author: kalilistic, maintained by khayle
Name: SillyChat
Description:
允许您翻译玩家和 NPC 聊天消息。
支持的语言包括：Pirate、Urianger、Leet、Pig Latin和Turkey。
Punchline: 使用 pirate 和 urianger 等翻译让聊天更有趣。

Author: goat, maintained by Franz
Name: Discord Rich Presence
Description: 此插件允许您在您的 Discord 状态中显示您的地区、职业、等级、名称和服务器。
Punchline: 在您的 Discord 状态中显示您的地区、职业、等级、名称和服务器

Author: rail
Name: WDIGViewer
Description: A plugin to display encounter strategies, or cats.
Punchline: View encounter strategy images.

Author: Stonewind
Name: Toastingway
Description: The Toastingway plugin.
Punchline: Keep on top of new items.

Author: Caraxi
Name: Adventurer in Need
Description: 当某个随机任务缺少你指定的职业的时候，发送一个通知。/pbonus 打开设置界面
Punchline: 当某个随机任务缺少你指定的职业的时候，发送一个通知。

Author: Mythic Palette
Name: Wordsmith
Description: Wordsmith 是一款考虑到角色扮演者的文本编辑器。 它会自动分解您的文本以便于复制/粘贴，具有高级功能、拼写检查，甚至是词库。
Punchline: 角色扮演词库和便签。

Author: zhudotexe
Name: PaissaHouse
Description:
Looking for that perfect house? PaissaHouse lets you receive notifications when a new plot of land is up for sale on your home world.
View the list of all houses available on a world at https://paissadb.zhu.codes/!

Want to contribute? Check out the repository (globe icon below) for instructions.
Punchline: Crowdsourced housing alerts and lottery tracking for all.

Author: Dragon
Name: Hunt Buddy
Description: 每日狩猎追踪器
Punchline: 帮你找到每日狩猎版的怪物位置

Author: kij
Name: ChatCoordinates
Description:
根据聊天内容在地图上放置标记
使用 /coord 打开配置界面看更详细的用法
Punchline: 将聊天中的坐标标记在地图上。

Author: Drahsid
Name: Target Lines
Description: Customizable target lines
Punchline: Customizable target lines

Author: Chivalrik
Name: Compass
Description:
检查仓库，了解如何报告丢失/错误的过滤器和隐藏选项。 
在安装常见的警告后，查看配置窗口中常见的常见问题标签
Punchline: 为您的冒险提供一维指南针。
Changelog:
- chore: Update to API14 (thanks @ashen-dawn)

NOTE: Since 7.0, Compass seems to work funky in some cases.
I am sorry, but I cannot promise that I will manage to work on plugins for the foreseeable future.
I can, however, promise to have a look at any potential PR in a timely manner.

Author: Kaz Wolfe
Name: BatteryGauge
Description: A Dalamud plugin that shows battery information in-game.
Punchline: Keep track of your FFXIV device's battery.

Author: NotNite
Name: Distant Seas
Description:
The ultimate Ocean Fishing plugin. Automatically suggests baits, logs each boat you're on, tracks progress to achievements, adds a global point leaderboard, and more!

Icon from the Mutant Standard project.
Punchline: The ultimate Ocean Fishing plugin.

Author: Cyenia, 53m1k0l0n, rennerdo30
Name: SimpleCompare
Description: Show simple item comparison when pressing SHIFT and hovering over item
Punchline: Simple item comparison

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: XIV Instant Messenger
Description:
功能：
- 开启小窗聊天
- 每个窗口指向一名玩家
- 通过热键打开和查阅最近的聊天记录
- 直接向聊天窗发送情感动作指令，而不需要手动选中对方
- 自动将聊天记录保存到一个简单易读的文本文件
- 样式可高度自定义
Punchline: WIM(WoW Instant Messenger)风格的消息管理器。

Author: Anna, maintained by Khayle
Name: Namingway
Description: 为能力和 Buff 重新命名
Punchline: 为能力技和 Buff 重新命名
Changelog: -# API 14 update

Author: Sonar Team
Name: Sonar
Description: Automatically send and receive hunt and fate relays. /sonar to open, /sonarconfig to configure. Support is only provided in the Sonar Support discord.
Punchline: Automatically send and receive hunt and fate relays.
Changelog: See https://news.ffxivsonar.com for more information

Author: Lore
Name: TooltipNotes
Description: Right-click any item in your inventory to start adding a note,or make a label in the config window to start adding your own labels
Punchline: A Plugin that lets you add notes to item Tooltips

Author: SaMo
Name: PvP Tracker
Description: Pvp Stats
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker.
Changelog: * Text alignment changes.

Author: img
Name: Island Workshop Search
Description: idk search the island workshop or something
Punchline: Helps highlight relevant workshops items

Author: Lynesth, maintained by Khayle
Name: Better Targeting System
Description: Better Targeting System
Punchline: A more intelligent targeting system for the game.

Author: Mei
Name: Oh Hey!
Description:
This plugin notifies you when someone targets you, or emotes at you.

Commands:
  /ohhey - Opens the main window
  /ohhey main - Opens the main window
  /ohhey [config|settings] - Opens the settings window
  /ohhey help - Displays the help message (will also display on invalid sub-commands)
Punchline: Ever wanted to get notified when someone targets you or emotes at you? Now you can!

Author: Zeffuro
Name: StatusTimers
Description: StatusTimers provides clear, customizable bars for tracking your crucial buffs and debuffs. It helps you keep an eye on active effects, their remaining durations, and stacks, allowing you to optimize your gameplay without constantly staring at your tiny icons.
Punchline: Before StatusTimers, my buffs/debuffs were a mystery. Now, it's a well-organized history!

Author: Sohtoren
Name: Altoholic
Description: Get informations (gils, currencies,  items, inventory, retainers, etc) and progress from all your characters
Punchline: Informations about your alts

Author: Infi, Sl0nderman, harbingerftw
Name: Blue Mage Helper
Description: Adds monster names and coordinates to the "Where to Learn" section of your blue mage spellbook.
Punchline: Helps you fill out your Blue Mage Spellbook

Author: Kouzukii
Name: Price Insight
Description:
当您鼠标悬停在物品上时会在物品信息底部展示该物品的 NQ/HQ 市场价格以及最近一次交易记录。
价格从 Universalis.app 中搜索，缓存保存90分钟。
您可以将鼠标悬停在物品上，点击Alt来刷新价格。
Punchline: 将光标悬停在物品上来查看市场价格

Author: goat, modded by Franz
Name: Discord Chat Bridge
Description: 此插件允许您通过 Discord 接收聊天消息。
Punchline: 通过 Discord 接收您的聊天消息。
Changelog:
Removed bot stop/start on logout/login events. It seems this was causing some issues.

The plugin will also now cache LocalPlayer on every Framework ticket instead of only on Login events. That should help with LocalPlayer resolutions showing up as null when they shouldn't be.

Author: MidoriKami
Name: HUDUnlimited
Description: Allows you to modify any and all individual elements of the user interface to allow you to customize it however you wish
Punchline: Total control of your User Interface

Author: Kliff!!
Name: Shanbells
Description: Shanbells in Eorzea
Punchline: Bringing Shananigans to Eorzea

Author: Chirp
Name: SelfCare
Description: Configurable reminders to hydrate and maintain a healthy posture.
Punchline: Remember to check your posture!

Author: Infi, kalilistic, Caitlyn
Name: PriceCheck
Description:
查价插件。通过按住快捷键+悬停在想要查询的物品上来查询。
数据来自 Universalis
Punchline: 快速价格查询

Author: rail
Name: Aether48
Description: Opens on death, or /a48. A 2048 clone mini-game. arrow keys or wasd
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A 2048 clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v1.0.0.3:api bump
v1.0.0.2: bug fixes, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.0.0.0: clean up
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

Author: Beletre
Name: Job Mount Roulette
Description: Job Mount Roulette
Punchline: Customized mount roulette per job.

Author: NeNeppie
Name: Lights, Camera, Action!
Description: This plugin lets you save unlimited camera & lighting configurations/presets in Group Pose at a time, vastly improving over the vanilla feature which lets you save only one of each.
Punchline: Save and load unlimited camera and lighting presets in Group Pose

Author: Koenari
Name: Himbeertoni Raid Tool
Description: 一些固定队工具，比如零式分配管理。
Punchline: 提供一些对副本有帮助的工具
Changelog:
General: Updated for 7.4
    Loot Session: All non weapon drops are now pre-selected in loot session

Author: perchbird
Name: Damage Info
Description: 为不同属性的伤害设置不同的颜色，可配置项包括伤害来源，具体染色位置等等
Punchline: 修改游戏内伤害数值以获取更多 (或更少) 的伤害信息。

Author: Cair
Name: Redirect
Description: 轻松更改魔法和能力技的目标优先级。 队列宏、冲刺和药水！ 键入 /redirect 进行配置。
Punchline: 改变你的行动优先级，队列宏，冲刺，爆发药！

Author: Tischel, Caitlyn
Name: Inventory Search Bar
Description:
支持不同类型的过滤器，能够按名称、类型、支持的职业或等级要求查找道具。

支持的物品栏：
	- 角色背包
	- 陆行鸟背包
	- 雇员背包
	- 装备库
Punchline: 在物品栏窗口中直接增加一个搜索栏来过滤物品。
Changelog:
# 1.9.2.0

- Update dependencies (fixes retainer search again)

Author: Liza Carvelli
Name: CollectableCalculator
Description: Shows how many scrips and items you would receive if you turn in your current inventory.
Punchline: Shows how many scrips and items you would receive if you turn in your current inventory.

Author: Fuwa Aika
Name: Wave Wrangler
Description: Never mess up your wave emoticon again!
Punchline: Never mess up your wave emoticon again!

Author: daemitus, Minmoose, MidoriKami
Name: ezMiniCactpot
Description: 仙人微彩插件，自动高亮最优解
Punchline: 显示仙人微彩下一步最优解。

Author: karashiiro
Name: PingPlugin
Description: Dalamud 的 ping 显示插件。
Punchline: Dalamud 的 ping 显示插件。
Changelog: Update for 7.4 & API 14. - BoxuChan

Author: Infi, Cadaeix
Name: XIVLogger
Description: 加载后将聊天日志保存为文本文件。/xivlogger：打开设置，/savelog：保存日志、/copylog：复制日志。
Punchline: 以文本格式保存聊天记录或者复制到剪贴板

Author: UnknownX
Name: QoL Bar
Description:
一个给聊天命令或其他插件、宏等等提供简单、可定制界面的插件
最开始这个插件会显示为界面下方的一个小方框。
Punchline: 支持自定义的可视化快捷栏

Author: Azure Gem
Name: Rezo Scale Plugin
Description:
Ever wanted to render at lower resolution? Now you can!
Only works with AMD FSR graphics upscaler
Punchline: Lower 3D Resolution Scale

Author: rail
Name: AetherGon
Description: Opens on death, or /agon. A super hexagon clone mini-game.A/D or left right arrow
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A super hexagon clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v1.2.0.2:api v14.0.2
v1.2.0.1:code clean up, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.2.0.0: clean up assets
1.1.0.0: beat sequencer added
1.0.0.0: difficulty, settings and stuff
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

Author: iri
Name: Photobooth
Description:
Take your portrait & adventurer plate game to the next level with this companion panel for the portrait editor.

• Rewind, fast forward, and step through animations frame by frame.
• Adjust character head and eye direction without moving the camera.
• Position camera and pivot point with a top-down map.
• More intuitive controls for lighting color and angle.
Punchline: Advanced controls for portraits & adventurer plates.

Author: Lily
Name: BISBuddy
Description:
Highlights gear, coffers, and materia needed for all your gearsets
Import from from Etro, Xivgear, or Teamcraft for easy setup
            
Highlights items needed for gearsets on:
    - Need/Greed Loot Windows
    - NPC Shops and Exchanges
    - Marketboard
    - Player Inventories
    - Item Tooltips
           
When melding materia, highlights:
    - Items to meld
    - Materia to meld to item
            
Automatically syncs gearsets with player inventory
Punchline: Gearing, simplified.

Author: X'pahtalo
Name: FFXIV2MQTT
Description: 发送数据至MQTT服务端以执行各种操作。用游戏宏调整灯光，在用机工进入过热状态时打开热水器，或者在切换至绝枪战士时开始播放《Rules of Nature》。需要一个兼容MQTTv5的服务端。
Punchline: 通过MQTT发送游戏信息

Author: spide-r
Name: Who Did That?
Description: Who Did That?
Punchline: Actively logs healing, cleanses, buffs, and more. Finally figure out who rescued you.

Author: SheepGoMeh
Name: Visibility
Description:
让你可以隐藏玩家，宠物和陆行鸟
内含VoidList（更好的黑名单插件）
/pvis 打开面板
/xlhelp 获取更多帮助信息
Punchline: 让你可以隐藏玩家，宠物和陆行鸟

Author: Teechep Bird
Name: FATE Helper
Description: Displays a list of all FATEs in the current area with: time remaining, percent completed, and bonus marker. Clicking on FATE name will flag it and teleport you, if flying isn't faster. Works with Eureka and Occult FATEs, and Bozja skirmishes. NOTE: this plugin does not track specific FATEs. You can add the Sonar plugin to track those.
Punchline: Makes FATEs suck slightly less, guaranteed! Disclaimer: atma drop rates will continue to suck.

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: EnemyListHP (former EnmityHp)
Description: 在敌人列表中显示敌人HP。只做这个，没有别的了。
Punchline: 在敌对列表显示HP

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Twitch XIV
Description: Allows you to join a Twitch chat and send messages and (optionally) have the twitch chat come through your chatbox.
Punchline: Sup y'all? It's ya boy, Twitch XIV, and today we're gonna be playing some final fantasy fourteen.

Author: rail
Name: Aetherial Arena
Description: A collectable battling mini game
Punchline: Find and collect creatures to fight.
Changelog: v1.0.0.0: stable release \v0.9.9.3:API 14, 7.4\nv0.9.9.2: Update to Dalamud api 13/patch 7.3, fix credits scrolling\nv0.9.9.1: reset ui scaling button, manual entry input

Author: 0x0ade
Name: CustomResolution
Description: Basic plugin that allows you to specify a custom resolution.
Punchline: Enforces a custom resolution for the game, similar to NVIDIA DSR.

Author: goat
Name: Wotsit
Description:
添加一个类似Spotlight 的方便快速搜索，让您打开游戏窗口、传送、找到维基文章等等。
按下 Control + T 打开搜索窗口。这可以通过搜索“Wotsit Settings”来更改。
Punchline: 查找任何东西，去任何地方。

Author: X'pahtalo (originally goat and Franz)
Name: Character Data Sync
Description:
这个插件允许你在所有其他人身上使用你的主要角色的角色数据。

在游戏中，使用配置菜单选择你的主角，重启游戏开始同步！
Punchline: 将您的角色数据从您的主要角色同步到所有其他角色

Author: Nightshade System
Name: PushyFinder
Description: Check on your party while away from the computer.
Punchline: Mobile push notifications for the Party Finder.

Author: K-Cli
Name: Bozja Buddy
Description: A plugin for Bozja content.
Punchline: Improve your Bozja sufferring. Maybe.

Author: Xorus
Name: EngageTimer
Description:
显示所有开始倒计时的数字！

功能 :
- 显示所有数字的倒计时
- 可自定义数字的纹理材质(默认，黄色，WoW 风格或自定义文件)
- 带有战斗计时器和倒计时器的浮动窗口
- 兼容OBS浏览器源的页面

为什么兼容OBS？ 是这样的，如果您想要在录制中能显示一个超大的倒计时，这会非常有用。
查看仓库获取更多信息。

请放心给我反馈bug或更多可改进的内容！
Punchline: 完成战斗倒计时、计时器和 OBS 叠加
Changelog: - API11 update

Author: Critical-Impact
Name: Fantasy Player
Description:
Control Spotify playback from within FFX|V
Use the button below to open settings or use the '/pfp settings' command.
Originally by BiscuitUmU
Localization by Dormanil
Punchline: Like you'd ever be sick of the in game music right?

Author: Due
Name: ContactsTracker
Description: Help you remember previous contacts.
Punchline: Help you record duty and who you met.

Author: XorelCodes
Name: Quiet The Den
Description: Auto-mute BGM while in the Wolves' Den, because I've had enough and it ends here.
Punchline: Stop yer ears bleedin' in the Wolves' Den

Author: Anna
Name: ExtraChat
Description: ExtraChat 增加了端到端加密、跨大区、无限制的通讯贝到游戏。
Punchline: 具有无限成员的跨数据中心链接外壳。

Author: Noevain,kalilistic, Anna
Name: NoSoliciting
Description:
可自定义聊天和对方查找过滤。 
除了允许您过滤聊天和招募板中的内容。 
它带有内置的筛选器用于以下内容：

- RMT (包括金币和内容)
- 部队广告
- RP 广告
- 钓鱼消息
- 静态招聘
- 贸易广告
- 社区广告
- 任何含有装备品级超过最大值的招募
Punchline: FF14 广告拦截

Author: Marconsou
Name: Deep Dungeon Tracker
Description:
-Keep track of the number of kills, coffers opened, regeneration potions consumed, potsherds obtained, total time and more.
-Examine the collected data.
-Scoring.
Punchline: Track things inside Deep Dungeons (Solo only).

Author: iv230
Name: Chat Proximity
Description: Know how far they talk from.
Punchline: Know how far they talk from.

Author: Snowy, KangasZ
Name: Eureka Helper
Description: A plugin to enchance your Eureka experience, updated for the most current patch
Punchline: Eureka Tracker in a plugin with many other features.

Author: NotNite
Name: ReSanctuary
Description:
一个无人岛插件。功能：

- 在地图上标记要采集的物品
- 采集&制作的TODO列表，展示所需的原料
- （计划中）更好的仓库界面
- 用于快速访问信息的小功能

图标来自Mutant Standard项目。
Punchline: 提升你的无人岛体验。

Author: smileyhead
Name: Sticky Focus Target
Description: Like /focustarget but with no overrides.
Punchline: Like /focustarget, but with no overrides.
Changelog: Initial release.

Author: spide-r
Name: PvPAnnouncer
Description: This plugin will cause character voice lines to play mid-match upon specific conditions being met.
Punchline: Do you want an announcer in your PvP Matches? Metem and the Scions have offered their services!

Author: Anna, Caitlyn
Name: Glamaholic
Description:
为幻化模板创建缓存
你可以导出、导出、分享你的幻化模板
Punchline: 保存并切换你的幻化模板。

Author: Olaren
Name: Easy Translate
Description:
Search anything and get the translations in other languages.
Use /et to open the ui or /et <search term> to search directly!
Punchline: Translate anything!

Author: MidoriKami, cas-c
Name: Where am I again?
Description: 在服务器和时间信息旁边的角落显示您所在的地图/区域。 使用 /waia 打开配置。
Punchline: 显示服务器信息旁边的区域/地区。

Author: Cytraen
Name: Seated Sidekick Spectator
Description: Adds chat or toast notifications whenever someone enters or exits your mount.
Punchline: Get notified when someone enters or exits your mount!
Changelog: - Update for 7.2

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: Weatherman
Description:
特征：
- 根据需要更改游戏时间和天气；
- 全局或每个区域单独执行更改；
- 完全阻止不受欢迎的天气出现。

此插件仅更改视觉效果：与时间/天气相关的功能，例如区域背景音乐、探索笔记是否可用、某些对象的状态将不受影响。
只有天空开阔的区域才会受到变化的影响（不是每个区域都可用，但正在适配中）。
Punchline: 允许精确地控制时段和每个区域或全球的天气情况。

Author: Khloe Leclair, BoxuChan
Name: WTSync
Description: WTSync
Punchline: View a list of all the Wondrous Tails duties shared by your party.

Author: perchbird
Name: Housemate
Description:
Housemate 提供多种功能，可以帮助你从游戏里其他人的房屋中获得灵感。
如果你正在寻找一个特定的家具或庭具，你可以在住宅区闲逛并检查其他人使用的家(庭) 具清单。如果你想看看别人拼的家具是由什么东西组成的，打开物品叠加功能，就可以看到它们是什么了！

注意：这个插件仅能显示信息，并不能帮助你放置家(庭) 具，甚至是卡bug放置家具到奇怪的位置。
Punchline: 显示关于房屋家具和物体的信息。

Author: Critical_Impact
Name: Allagan Item Search
Description: Allagan Item Search is a dalamud plugin designed to help you search and filter all the items available in the game.
Punchline: Trying to find that item you don't know the name of? Maybe Allagan Item Search can help.

Author: wompscode
Name: NowPlaying
Description: Display what is playing in your server bar, and play/pause/skip.
Punchline: Display what is playing in your server bar, and play/pause/skip. (Windows only)

Author: Infi, kalilistic
Name: PlayerTrack
Description:
PlayerTrack 可帮助您记录您遇到的人和一起玩的内容。
将玩家分类，记笔记，并在名称/世界更改时跟踪他们。
自定义选项包括颜色、图标、铭牌和警报。
Punchline: 跟踪你遇见的玩家

Author: Infi, herulume, sevii
Name: OpenerCreator
Description: Create your opener and practice with a striking dummy. Provides basic analysis.
Punchline: Create, save, and practice your openers.

Author: Tischel
Name: DelvCD
Description: DelvCD provides highly customizable UI elements that can be used to track cooldows, status and more with configurable conditions.
Punchline: Customizable UI elements to track cooldowns, status and more.

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Graphics Config
Description: Allows you to save/load/share graphics setting presets (based on your System Configuration menu) at any time, including when triggered by events like entering a battle, cutscene, duty, gpose, and more. Also supports conditions like loading into a city or foray areas.
Punchline: Save/load shareable graphics setting presets at any time or auto-load them during specified conditions like where you are or what content you are doing.

Author: ocealot
Name: VFXEditor
Description: 查看、编辑 VFX，同时可以导出为 Penumbra Mod
Punchline: 特效编辑器和查看器

Author: PunishedPineapple
Name: Say What?
Description: 将NPC 语音气泡打印到聊天日志。 请检查插件设置和您的聊天日志过滤器，以确保它们彼此兼容。
Punchline: 持久的 NPC 风格文本

Author: rail
Name: AetherPool
Description: Pool in FFXIV
Punchline: A 2D pool game inside Final Fantasy XIV.
Changelog:
v0.5.1.1: audio fix and sfx control added
v0.5.1.0: API 14, 7.4
v0.5.0.0: update for Dalamud api 13/patch 7.3.
 v0.4.0.0: Advanced triggers and major UI/visual enhancements. 
 - Added 'Open on X' triggers for death, queue, etc.
 - Added a new title screen with background and outlined text.
 - Added a player assignment indicator to the HUD.
 - Added 'Victory'/'Game Over' text at the end of a match.
 - Replaced the cue ball with a new custom texture.

Author: Cytraen
Name: Handy Hotbar Helper
Description: Shows a window next to the Actions & Traits menu when your hotbars are missing actions.
Punchline: Helps show what actions are missing from your hotbars.

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Random Class Selector
Description: Allows you to select a random class to do dailies/etc on.
Punchline: Can't decide what class to work on today? Let the plugin decide for you!

Author: salanth357
Name: NoTypeSay
Description: Tired of typing snae ling?
Punchline: Tired of typing snae ling? Click instead!

Author: Megurt
Name: Which Mount
Description: Searching for other player's mount
Punchline: Check what mount someone is using and browse the full mount collection.

Author: Infi, mudcrab2142
Name: Diadem Calculator
Description: Calculates your current sessions points and scrip reward
Punchline: Yet another useful calculator~

Author: Loody
Name: BetterFriendList
Description:
Friend list but with better sorting, can search by name, refresh with a button, color names..
Right click for context menu.
Punchline: SE friend list sucks.

Author: gaypotatoemma
Name: Ascian Music Player
Description: A music player to play your own music files from within the game.
Punchline: Even the Ascians needed some tunes.

Author: Vielle Janlenoux
Name: RPP - Roleplay Profiles
Description: 一个欧服RP插件，当玩家使用RP标志时展示他的Chaos Archives (chaosarchives.org)档案。
Punchline: 在游戏内展示来自欧洲区 Chaos Archives 的简介。

Author: Azure Gem
Name: I Hate Caps Lock
Description:
SORRY CAPS
Remove caps lock when pressing any of the configured keys.
Punchline: Don't you hate CAPS LOCK so much?

Author: goat, modded by Franz
Name: OwO
Description: 这个插件把你的聊天 uwu 化。
Punchline: owo 聊天

Author: lokinmodar
Name: Echoglossian
Description: 游戏文本实时翻译器
Punchline:
对话和其他游戏内文本的翻译？是的，我们有！
已知问题：https://github.com/lokinmodar/Echoglossian/issues/12

Author: rail
Name: BeastieBuddy
Description: A searchable list of all mobs and their known locations, using community data. Use /bbuddy to open, or search with /bbuddy <mob_name>.
Punchline: A searchable mob database with spawn locations for Beastmaster, Blue Mage, or hunts
Changelog:
v1.3.3.1:api bump, search hang fix
v1.3.3.0: UI adjustments and data syncing improvements.
v1.3.2.0: stats

Author: Caraxi
Name: Macro Chain
Description:
允许你在一个宏的末尾使用 /nextmacro 来连接下一个宏
在 宏 #01的末尾添加 /nextmacro 将会自动执行 宏 #02
在 宏 #01的末尾添加 /nextmacro down 将会自动执行 宏 #11
也可以在聊天窗输入 /runmacro 来执行任意宏，不过该指令在其他宏执行时不生效
Punchline: 衔接运行多个宏

Author: daemitus, hiroa, MidoriKami, foophoof
Name: ZodiacBuddy
Description: 此插件将用多种方法帮助你完成古武。
Punchline: 古武助手

Author: attickdoor
Name: Ability Ants
Description: 给离不开WA的魔兽玩家提供在技能冷却时高亮按钮的功能。输入 /pants 打开设置。
Punchline: 技能冷却完毕时高亮显示。

Author: Caraxi
Name: Honorific
Description: Assign custom titles to players.
Punchline: Customized titles for you and yours.

Author: Anya Hichu
Name: ChatContext
Description: Dalamud plugin to add sender target to chat messages.
Punchline: Add sender target name in chat messages.

Author: Cytraen, Anna
Name: Sound Filter
Description:
为游戏内过滤/添加音效
- 移除你不喜欢的音效
- 移除某个情感动作的声音
- 移除特定的 BGM
Punchline: 过滤掉自定义游戏音效。

Author: Infi, electr0sheep
Name: Eureka Linker
Description: 在优雷卡中自动弹出NM
Punchline: We All Love Eureka And Occult

Author: Infi, PunishedPineapple
Name: Ready Check Helper
Description: 在聊天框显示在准备确认结束后尚未确认的玩家名称，另也支持在小队列表上显示准备确认的状态图标。
Punchline: 扩展游戏内置的准备确认。

Author: Anna, maintained by foophoof
Name: Tourist
Description:
Tourist 添加一个窗口来辅助探索笔记。

- 当探索笔记可用时显示
- 为 2.0 的探索笔记位置添加光球提示
- 在您的地图上标记探索笔记位置
- 隐藏已完成或不可用的位置
- 显示记录每个探索笔记所需的命令
Punchline: 协助你完成探索笔记。

Author: Caraxi & Ottermandias
Name: ChatAlerts
Description: Play sounds and highlight text based on defined filters.
Punchline: 根据定义的过滤器播放声音和高亮文本。

Author: Speedas
Name: Steam Recording Enhanced
Description:
Enhance Steam Game Recording by automatically adding configurable in-game events to the timeline, allowing for easy rewinding and clipping. Rewind to the moment of your death to reassure yourself that you did dodge the AOE before it went off and that the game does hate you personally with greater efficiency than ever!

Non-steam users will have to follow a setup guide located in the configuration's window Status tab to get everything working.
Punchline: Add various in-game events to your Steam Game Recording timeline, comes with instructions for non-steam users!

Author: ItsBexy
Name: CrossUp
Description:
此插件为十字热键栏提供了各种外观与功能定制。

-向左/向右拆分热键栏
-分开显示扩展热键栏
-自定义控件的颜色与位置
-更好地控制你的特殊热键栏被映射到哪一组
Punchline: 自定义十字快捷栏！

Author: MgAl2O4
Name: TriadBuddy
Description:
幻卡求解器，只能用于NPC对战
- 高亮下一步的位置
- 为NPC求算最优卡组
- 在幻卡列表界面添加了更多的详细信息
Punchline: 幻卡求解器

Author: MidoriKami
Name: VanillaPlus
Description: This plugin is primarily focused on various UI adjustments, behavior adjustments, and adding new native elements to the game
Punchline: A collection of various game modifications

Author: ocealot
Name: JobBars
Description: 附加职业量谱，队伍buff计时，减伤监控和更多功能。图标由PAPACHIN提供
Punchline: 额外的职业量谱

Author: Franz
Name: FlashOnTell
Description: 当你收到私聊时，在任务栏闪烁FF14的图标。这个插件暂时没有可设置的选项。
Punchline: 当你收到私聊时，在任务栏闪烁FF14的图标

Author: kalilistic, karashiiro, shadow_kras
Name: NeatNoter
Description: NeatNoter 允许您在无需切换窗口的情况下进行笔记。
Punchline: 一个记笔记的插件

Author: Infi, VariableVixen
Name: StackSellPrice
Description: 显示工具提示上物品的全套销售价格
Punchline: 因为大量增加比较困难。

Author: Meoiswa
Name: Fast Job Switcher
Description: Fast Job Switcher
Punchline: Always five* keystrokes away from any job

Author: rail
Name: AetherBreaker
Description: A game to play when dead. Open with /abreaker.
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A Puzzle Bobble clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v2.1.1.3:API 14, 7.4
v2.1.0.3: fixed audio volume setting bug. 
v2.1.0.2:net build fix for compiling
v2.1.0.1: update for patch 7.3/api 13.
v2.1.0.0: Music chest unlock added, multiplayer server fix, redesign aiming line.

Author: Aly
Name: AutoTimer
Description: A sample plugin.
Punchline: Auto-Attack Timer Bar.

Author: Bluefissure
Name: MapLinker
Description: 自动记录聊天中的地图标记并在之后查询。
Punchline: 记录聊天框中的地图坐标

Author: MidoriKami
Name: DailyDuty
Description: 自动追踪并去完成许多日常和周常任务。
Punchline: 轻松地追踪日常和周常任务。

Author: Infi, Caitlyn
Name: Death Roll Helper
Description:
可帮助进行一些使用 /random 和 /dice 指令的游戏的插件。

聚会模式：
    +以基于列表的格式简明显示所有参与者
    +包括“真心话大冒险”和“亚马逊抽奖”模式
    +支持多种排序类型（最小、最大、最接近）
    +基于正则表达式匹配高亮数字
死亡掷骰模式：
    +支持多个玩家
    +自动检查每个玩家的正确号码范围
锦标赛模式：
    +1对1死亡掷骰锦标赛
    +自动生成等级
    +玩家数不平均将会用轮空填充
    +通过洗牌实现随机化
    +如果玩家需要离开，则会被处罚
21点模式：
    +支持所有正常的动作
    +基于标准规则自动计算奖励
    +纸牌可视化
    +自动抽牌或玩家手动roll点抽牌
    +当前玩家可以无缝开始下一回合
    +计划进一步支持自定义规则（例如，庄家可以在点数超过16时继续拿牌）

功能：
    +可以禁止玩家参与你的游戏
    +仅接受 /random 和 /dice 指令
    +可以从游戏/锦标赛中踢出玩家

支持英语、德语和法语。（日语正在计划中）
根据反馈，计划在将来的更新中提供更多功能。
Punchline: 可帮助进行一些使用 /random 和 /dice 指令的游戏的插件。

Author: GitHixy
Name: LootView
Description: Track all your loot with detailed statistics, duty tracking, history browser, trends analysis, and data export. Features modern UI with customizable styles and transparency. NEW in 1.3.0: 'loop of' crafting tracking, 'is added to your inventory' message support, 'The' prefix item name matching, Show On Duty Start setting, Item Blacklist system with right-click context menu. v1.2.6: Enhanced crafting synthesis tracking (coil/plank/length/stack/bolt of items), sack of Nuts support.
Punchline: Comprehensive loot tracking with statistics and analytics

Author: Zeffuro
Name: ZDs
Description: Show when cooldowns come off cooldown in an intuitive way!
Punchline: ZeeDees, bring the Zs to your Ds!

Author: Felys, maintained by Limiana
Name: EnemyListDebuffs
Description: 在敌人列表上显示你给与的负面状态。最早由aers实现。
Punchline: 更加轻松地监控你的dot列表

Author: Gotest
Name: Audible Character Status
Description:
Plays a sound for certain statuses of the player. Such as low HP or MP.
You will need to provide your own sound files.
Punchline: You like annoying low HP sounds? This is great for you!
Changelog: Updated to API 13.

Author: JayceOfSpades
Name: Mini-Mappingway
Description: 一款用来在小地图上显示你的朋友和部队成员的插件，你可以进行自定义标记或者在设置中切换你的朋友以及部队成员的显示设置！图标来自推特上的@Miendoodle，感谢nya的想法！
Punchline: 一款用来在小地图上显示你的朋友和部队成员标记的插件

Author: Caitlyn, Anna
Name: Expanded Search Info
Description:
检查时显示从搜索信息中提取的额外信息。
支持：
- 任何纯文本 URL
- Pastebin.com
- carrd.co/crd.co
- F-List
- Refsheet
只需检查具有包含指向其中之一的指针的搜索信息的人
这些位置和插件将自动显示信息。
图标：由名词项目的 Gregor Cresnar 扩展
Punchline: 检查时显示从搜索信息中提取的额外信息。

Author: CFG
Name: FC Name Color
Description:
如果您的 FC 或其他指定的 FC 中有 FC 的标签或整个铭牌，则为它们着色。
使用 Lodestone 数据工作，因此它可以继续在职责内以及在不同的服务器上工作！
Punchline: 为您的部队成员的部队标签着色
FeedbackMessage: Please include your character’s name and server if you’re reporting a bug or issue. This helps a lot with the troubleshooting process.

Author: MgAl2O4
Name: Pat Me
Description: 你有没有想过你的拉拉肥被拍了多少次？ 好吧，现在你可以数了！
Punchline: 拍拍计数器

Author: Vielle Janlenoux
Name: Snooper
Description: 添加一个/snooper命令，显示一个单独的窗口，只显示您当前选择的玩家的消息。 在拥挤的 RP 事件中记录不同的对话非常有用。
Punchline: 在单独的窗口中查看您当前目标的聊天消息。

Author: Khayle, daemitus, attick
Name: XIV Uncombo
Description: This plugin splits combos and native abilities into more buttons.
Punchline: Splits combos into more button for more button bloating. Requires BLU spells.

Author: Blooym
Name: GoodFriend
Description: 在其他好友也使用该插件的情况下即时展示好友上线/下线提醒。提供可自定义的消息和通知显示设置。担心隐私或只想与某些朋友收发通知？使用朋友代码，仅向指定朋友通知你的状态。
Punchline: 好友上/下线通知（仅限同样使用GoodFriend的朋友）

Author: James Keesey
Name: Chatter
Description: Plugin to save and filter chats.
Punchline: Saves and filters chats.

Author: Meoiswa
Name: Clarity In Chaos
Description: Automatically adjusts the Battle Effects settings according to Party size.
Punchline: Seek visual serenity in the midst of Chaos

Author: Det
Name: Target Furniture
Description:
目前选择家具的唯一可能办法是用你的鼠标手动点击它。 如果你有几个靠得很近的家具这就会很麻烦。
此插件添加了一个新的选项，右键单击Housing Menu中的一个家具时可以帮你自动选中，能够省去很多麻烦事。
Punchline: 添加一个能够从Housing Menu中选中或移动家具的选项。
Changelog: 6.5 update

Author: Noevain
Name: Voice Director
Description: Changes your VO language by specifying a language and an instance, your language will revert to the default when you exit. Icon designed by Leremy from Flaticon
Punchline: Changes your VO language on a per-duty basis

Author: Critical-Impact
Name: Allagan Tetris
Description: A not so faithful recreation of the legendary game.
Punchline: Even the Allags had time to burn!

Author: Fuwa Aika
Name: Razer Reader
Description: A Dalamud plugin for FFXIV that displays the battery level of your wireless Razer devices
Punchline: Display the battery level of your wireless Razer devices

Author: Fuwa Aika
Name: Grace Gawker
Description: An overlay plugin that displays the remaining XP for your Crafter's/Gatherer's Grace buffs.
Punchline: View the remaining XP on Crafter's/Gatherer's Grace

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: JustBackup
Description: 此插件在游戏/插件启动时自动备份您的游戏和插件配置。
Punchline: 自动备份您的游戏和插件配置。

Author: meoiswa
Name: Total Level
Description: Shows the total level of a Character in the Search Info panel

Author: Infi, ash, Anna
Name: Better Party Finder
Description:
更好的组队搜索器。

在原本的过滤条件的基础上有如下的更新内容：

- 创建并切换过滤器预设
- 白名单/黑名单特定的任务和种类
- 添加角色名隐藏其发布的组队招募
- 删除超过最大装等的招募
- 通过装等范围进行过滤
- 通过特定的职业进行过滤（例如：机工+枪刃）
Punchline: 使用高级的队员招募过滤器预设。

Author: Infi, attick
Name: Mouseover Action
Description: 该插件可以为某个技能设置复杂的执行流程，来做到“像宏一样执行，但不是宏”的目的。使用 /pmoaction 打开配置界面
Punchline: 鼠标指向施法

Author: pinapelz
Name: Malmstone Calculator
Description: A PVP Series Malmstones Level Calculator
Punchline: Keep tabs on how much more PVP you have to play before unlocking your next Series Malmstone reward!

Author: Caraxi
Name: FPS Plugin
Description: 显示游戏帧数
Punchline: 显示游戏 FPS

Author: Nylfae
Name: Hyperfocus
Description: Points towards your targets when they're off-screen.
Punchline: Out of sight, still in mind.

Author: VariableVixen
Name: Positional Assistant
Description: If you have a hard time telling whether you're in the right spot for positional attacks, this plugin can draw guidelines on your screen to help you tell where you need to be.
Punchline: Never guess whether you'll make that positional again!

Author: Bluefissure
Name: OBSPlugin
Description: 通过 Websocket 控制 OBS 的插件。
Punchline: 通过 websocket 控制 OBS

Author: X'pahtalo (originally Anna)
Name: Burnt Toast
Description: 隐藏你不想看到的悬浮通知
Punchline: 隐藏你不想看到的 Toast 通知

Author: NotNite, MidoriKami, maintained by Khayle
Name: OfDungeonsDeep
Description:
Based loosely on DeepDungeonDex (by Strati), OfDungeonsDeep is an all-in-one tool for Deep Dungeon floor and mob information.
Data sourced with permission from https://www.ddcompendium.com/.

Author: attick, perchbird & Speedas
Name: Title Edit
Description: 用你在游戏内最喜欢的地方来制作一个游戏标题画面，并且每次开启游戏都能看到你喜爱的景色。插件内包含一些预先准备好的主画面供你使用或启发你的灵感，也可以轻松导入其他人分享的标题画面。

Author: Aireil

此插件可在读图时显示目标区域的印象画。
注意：仅在 16:9 显示器上看起来完好！印象画就这么大，我们也无法放大或者修复它。非常抱歉！
Punchline: 加载时显示目标区域的概念图。

Author: Hiroa
Name: LazyGatherer
Description: Display the optimal rotation for maximum yield with your current GP.

Author: tesu
Name: Penny Pincher
Description:
用来“压一压”(将交易板上的最低价压一金)的插件

正常的压价流程：
1.打开调整物品价格的窗口
2.查看物品在市场上的时价
3.记下目前最低的时价
4.使用高超的数学技巧算出压价一块后的价格
5.关掉市场时价窗口
6.将算出的数字填入你的售价
7.确认物品的售价

但有了这个神奇的插件，就可以在你打开市场时价窗口时，自动根据最低价计算压价后的价格并复制到你的剪贴板上，省去了困难的计算压价环节。

有了这个插件，就可以轻松的完成压价：
1.打开调整物品价格的窗口
2.查看物品在市场上的时价
3.关掉市场时价窗口
4.将插件算出的数字粘贴到你的售价
5.确认物品的售价

这样省去了复杂的计算步骤，还能防止手滑少填一位数字
Punchline: 查看市场时价时自动复制当前最低价格减1的价格

Author: WildWolf
Name: MonsterDex
Description: 深层迷宫怪物图鉴，可以显示目标怪物的攻击类型、主观评价的危险程度、眩晕耐性、以及对其一些机制的概述。危险程度是针对单人玩家是否要谨慎对待来进行评价的，并且假定玩家不是一个一无所知的初见，他对深层迷宫的机制和所处的层数相对熟悉。这些信息来自众包，相对比较准确，但如果你发现任何错误之处，或者你想提交未测试的数据，请在 GitHub 上提交 issue ，或是在 Deep Dungeons 和 QuickLauncher 的 Discord 服务器内和我联系。
Punchline: 鉴定一下网络热门深层迷宫怪物

Author: Meoiswa
Name: Auto BGM
Description: Automated BGM switching based on Client Conditions.
Punchline: Like /bgm but automatic

Author: Nadya
Name: Tidy Chat
Description:
强烈建议您编辑默认设置，因为您可能不同意哪些消息应被视为“垃圾消息”！

提供细粒度过滤器选项来过滤几乎所有与游戏相关的垃圾消息，只在您的聊天中留下重要的游戏消息。

   - 过滤大多数垃圾游戏消息
   - 屏蔽来自其他玩家的表情垃圾邮件
   - 将获得的赞浓缩成一行
   - 缩短冗长的消息，例如加入新手网络或进入实例区域
   - 屏蔽一段时间重复出现的消息
   - 自动将“在 /say 中的聊天模式”任务对话复制到剪贴板
   - 编写自定义过滤器以允许/屏蔽消息！
   - 更多！
Punchline: 更好的游戏消息和深入的聊天过滤器来保持整洁的聊天。

Author: Elypha
Name: BilingualTooltips
Description: In case the WoL speaks more than one language
Punchline: In case the WoL speaks more than one language

Author: Zhyra
Name: PartyPlanner
Description: partake.gg, directly on your client!
Punchline: Browse community events sourced from partake.gg directly from your client!

Author: NightmareXIV, Chalkos
Name: QuestAWAY
Description: 在地图上隐藏你不想看到的标记，包括但不限于任务标记等。
Punchline: 从地图上删除你不想要的图标

Author: hunter2_
Name: Minesweeper
Description: A logic puzzle featuring hidden mines.
Punchline: Classic puzzle game.

Author: perchbird
Name: ResLogger2.Plugin
Description:
ResLogger2允许你在一个快速而方便的窗口中记录游戏加载的资源。
有多种选项，包括只记录唯一路径、按路径滤器，以及上传找到的路径。

关于资源路径的信息可在以下网站获得
https://rl2.perchbird.dev
Punchline: 具有可选众包功能的资源路径记录器。
Changelog: New feature! Filtering paths using Regex by @karou

Author: UnknownX
Name: A Realm Recorded
Description: 在大多数副本中启用游戏自带的录制功能。请确保在“/record”中启用设置。
Punchline: 允许您使用任务回顾

Author: MidoriKami, harbingerftw
Name: Mappy
Description: Replaces the in-game map with an ImGui implementation with several additional features.
Punchline: A more versatile in-game map.

Author: Glyceri
Name: Acquisition Date
Description: A plugin that shows the acquisition date of stuff.
Punchline: Shows the date when you acquired something.

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Teamcraft List Maker
Description:
No more alt tabbing, no more writing down names of items, just add and export!

This plugin is not created by Teamcraft staff and they are not responsible for it. To report issues or request new features, please click the globe icon and submit them using the issues tab.

(Logo used with permission from Teamcraft owner)
Punchline: Adds a new menu when right clicking items that lets you easily add/remove items to a list and then export it to Teamcraft

Author: img02
Name: Hunt Helper
Description: 带有刷新点的狩猎地图，A怪行车记录仪 (支持导出导入与共享), TTS, 聊天通知, S怪计数器。
Punchline: 狩猎雷达、狩猎车记录、提醒、S怪助手等

Author: Speedas
Name: Emote log
Description: Adds a window logging all emotes used on you, so you never miss a sneaky dote again.
Punchline: Track who used what emotes on you.

Author: Glyceri
Name: Fatal Frame
Description: Takes screenshots automatically for events.
Punchline: Takes a screenshot upon death (and other events).

Author: MidoriKami
Name: Chill Frames
Description: 感觉只是四处走走，显卡就烫到能煎鸡蛋了？在采集模式下何必还要渲染240超高帧率？别再苦恼了！Chill Frames 可以在非战斗状态下自动限制帧率！
Punchline: 在非战斗时限制帧率

Author: Pilzinsel64, r00telement
Name: Player Tags
Description:
轻量级显示职业于铭牌和聊天。创建自定义标签并通过菜单将其添加到玩家身上。
你想贡献并帮助开发新的功能或想扩展现有的功能？请自由地创建Fork，并创建一个Pull Request!
这个插件最初由r00telement开发，但现由Pilzinsel64创建分支并继续开发。
Punchline: 在铭牌和聊天中的轻量级职业显示。

Author: Violet Stardust
Name: XivGearExport
Description: A plugin that allows easy export of gearsets to xivgear.app.
Punchline: A simple utility that allows easy export of your gearsets to xivgear.app.

Author: PunishedPineapple
Name: Item Use
Description: Displays indicators in the item help popup for when an item is used by leves, GC dailies, etc. to help you decide what is worth keeping, selling, or taking as a reward.
Punchline: Easily see common item uses.

Author: Tischel
Name: TPie
Description: 可以用一个绑定快捷键来切换的高度可配置的热键栏。热键栏可以用动作、物品、装备套装或宏来填充。
Punchline: 可自定义的环形热键栏。
Changelog:
# 1.13.0.2

- Fixed nested rings bug introduced in last version.

Author: goat, Maple
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes
Description:
此插件在超宽监视器上观看过场剧情时移除黑边栏。
小心！你可能会看到一些你不应该看到的东西，例如 NPC 突然出现或预设姿势。

感谢 aers 找到这个方法。
Punchline: 从超宽显示器上的过场剧情中移除黑边。

Author: nebel
Name: Currency Watchdog
Description: Provides a configurable overlay, configurable alerts, and a powerful rule system for displaying how many currency (or non-currency) items you have (or don't have). A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.
Punchline: Shows an overlay and/or sends alerts when your held currency items (or non-currency items) match configurable rules. A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.

Author: VariableVixen
Name: AutoMountBgm
Description: Automatically enables/disables mount BGM depending on the mount you use
Punchline: Automatically control mount BGM for individual mounts!

Author: Berna, kai, Kiri
Name: Congratulations
Description: Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.
Punchline: Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.

Author: Sylf
Name: Monster Loot Hunter
Description: A monster loot finder plugin.
Punchline: Check where you can obtain materials.
Changelog:
- Update for API 14
- Loot data cache
- Refactors on code

Author: Helios
Name: Adaptive Hud
Description:
对超宽用户十分有用，用于窗口和全屏自动切换

/pah 进行配置设定
Punchline:
游戏从窗口切换到全屏时切换 
/hudlayout。

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: NotificationMaster
Description: Notifies you about various events while your game is minimized.
Punchline: Currently supports notifications: chat messages, approaching map flag, duty found, ending of cutscenes, gp restoration, error during logging in, mob has been pulled.

Author: Infi
Name: Easy MBHistory
Description: 将市场交易历史复制到剪贴板，有一些可配置项。
Punchline: 导出市场布告板的交易记录

Author: wompscode
Name: AFKMute
Description: AFKMute
Punchline: Mutes your game when you're AFK.

Author: athene
Name: NICE Damage Flyouts
Description: Adds the message NICE to your damage flyout when you get a hit ending in 69. No that's it for real.
Punchline: Adds the message NICE to your damage flyout when you get a hit ending in 69.

Author: Nuffin
Name: Better Mount Roulette
Description: 允许任意数量的指定随机坐骑，不必受限于游戏自带最多30个收藏的限制。
Punchline: 选择在随机坐骑显示哪些坐骑。

Author: Bluefissure
Name: No Kill Plugin
Description: 一个简单的插件，防止游戏因大厅错误而自动关闭。
Punchline: 遇到错误代码时不再直接关闭游戏

Author: Infi
Name: Inspecto
Description: A simple plugin that keeps a history of people you inspected.
Punchline: Look back at that cute search comment even hours later~

Author: Chickenstew
Name: Stormtalons
Description: 以风暴之爪（来自过气游戏《荒野星球》）的形式展示目标血条。
Punchline: 以风暴之爪（来自过气游戏《荒野星球》）的形式展示目标血条。

Author: perchbird (originally Meli)
Name: Orchestrion Plugin
Description:
Orchestrion 插件允许您更改当前游戏中的 BGM。 它包含
一个游戏中最准确的歌曲列表， 所以你确切知道正在播放
哪首曲子以便日后查找！ 也可添加添加喜欢的歌曲。
注意：此插件目前不允许您播放实际的乐曲。
Punchline: 添加一个简单的前端来浏览和更改游戏内的BGM。
Changelog: Update for 6.2.

Author: Tischel
Name: ActionTimeline
Description: 在可自定义的时间轴显示你使用的技能。
Punchline: 实时显示您的技能时间轴。
Changelog:
# 1.8.0.0

- Added support for Patch 7.4 and Dalamud API 14.

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: MogMogCheck
Description: MogMogCheck is a small plugin to assist you in tracking the rewards of the Moogle Treasure Trove event (called Mog Mog Kollektion in German, hence the name).
Punchline: Tracking assistant for Moogle Treasure Trove rewards.

Author: Caraxi, maintained & updated by Khayle
Name: Item Search
Description: 高级物品搜索，根据指定的条件筛选物品。并且可以在没有拥有的情况下发送物品到聊天。
Punchline: 搜索并链接道具，即使您没有获得它们。

Author: Ottermandias
Name: RezPls
Description: 更轻松的展示谁在复活谁、谁已经被复活了、谁身上有 Debuff 等状态。在野外和团队列表也有效。
Punchline: 高亮显示可被复活的角色或可被驱散的负面效果

Author: Rül Hölos
Name: Bartender
Description:
Save and load hotbar profiles with chat commands and/or macros.
Allows for automation too!
Punchline: Save and load hotbars into profiles, re-use them later, profit.

Author: Infi
Name: Hunty
Description:
Never has it been that easy to finish your hunting log. 

+ List of monsters in the same location based on Rank
+ Clickable coords to open your map on that exact location
+ Clickable dungeon name to open your duty finder
+ Easy to switch between Grand Company and Jobs
+ Automatic selection based on current job
Punchline: Time to finish your log?

Author: Haplo064
Name: Pixel Perfect
Description: 显示判定点。
Punchline: 显示你人物的判定点，和一个外圈圆环。（用于极限躲机制和可视化技能距离）

Author: Frogworks Interactive
Name: OOF!
Description: 我爱Roblox！！！
Punchline: 在摔落或死亡或因摔落而死时播放“OOF！”音效。

Author: Franz
Name: ChatTyper
Description: 给聊天框消息添加聊天类型编号和名称前缀。
Punchline: 这在很大程度上仍然是一种调试工具，但是人们喜欢他？

Author: spide-r
Name: SoundEffectMuter
Description:
This plugin silences all text sound effects and quick chat.

For feedback, please contact .spider in the Dalamud discord.
Punchline: Quiets the Gameplay Experience.

Author: MidoriKami
Name: Who am I again?
Description: Shows who you are in the server info bar.
Punchline: Ever forget who you are? We can fix that!

Author: KazWolfe
Name: XIVDeck
Description:
这个插件允许玩家将几乎任何能够使用热键栏的动作放置到 Stream Deck 上，包括热键栏插槽本身。 
直接调用操作，这意味着不需要绑定快捷键或其他笨拙的设置。

请注意，还必须安装 XIVDeck Stream Deck 插件才能使本插件生效。你可以从链接的GitHub仓库的 "Releases "中下载Stream Deck插件。

请将所有问题报告给 Dalamud Support 服务器中的 KazWolfe#2896 或在 GitHub 上创建issue。
Punchline: 将你的 Stream Deck 与狒狒14结合起来!

Author: Infi, Caitlyn
Name: Better Playtime
Description:
提供额外功能来无缝记录总游玩时间。
每个角色只需要执行一次/playtime（再次执行会刷新时间）

- 支持多个角色
- 自定义输出格式，例如小时数或分钟数
Punchline: 详细展示总游玩时长。

Author: Critical-Impact
Name: Tippy
Description:
由goat于2021年愚人节开发，被kal不必要地复活了。

由我们最优秀的代码工匠手工，拥有特殊的AI， 
他将分析您的播放风格，给您提供有用的技巧，让您的游戏进入下一级别。

他可以做的一些事情：
* 他可以给出关于游戏的一般性建议
* 他可以给出关于你正在做的任务的建议
* 他可以报告你的战斗性能
* 他会尊重你的感受。
Punchline: 您新的FFXIV虚拟助手。

Author: Meoiswa
Name: Magitek Stratagem
Description: Eye and Head tracker integration
Punchline: Tobii and Eyeware Eye and Opentrack tracker support for FFXIV

Author: ItsLunaYup
Name: High FPS Physics Fix
Description:
通过每隔一帧更新来让物理效果能在高帧率下生效。
用 /physics 指令来切换。
可能会在较低的 FPS 值上引起抖动。 
在禁用插件后需要重启游戏来再次启用。
Punchline: 将屏幕最大刷新率减半，在fps较高时恢复它。

Author: Anna, Maintained by chirp & Khayle
Name: Globetrotter
Description: 自动显示藏宝图的位置。
Punchline: 自动显示藏宝图指示的位置。

Author: Felscream
Name: DragoonMayCry
Description: DragoonMayCry
Punchline: A plugin that ranks your performance based on your fundamentals in combat

Author: Leon Aquitaine
Name: Sightseeingway
Description: Renames screenshots as they are created to include character name, map name, and coordinates. Monitors default, Reshade and GShade screenshots.
Punchline: Automatically rename your screenshots with character and location info.

Author: Populo
Name: Retainer Sales
Description: Quickly see which retainers have sold something while you were logged off.
Punchline: See retainer sales quicker

Author: d87
Name: BigPlayerDebuffs
Description: 在目标的 buff 栏上，将自己施加的 buff 放大显示。
Punchline: 放大由你施加的debuff
Changelog:
* v1.1.0.9
 * 6.5 Dalamud Update

Author: ItsBexy
Name: Gauge-O-Matic
Description: Gauge-O-Matic
Punchline: Enhance and customize job gauges.

Author: pupwife
Name: Dispeller
Description: A cute plugin to help you manage your Glamour Dresser by identifying items that share the same visual models.
Punchline: Easily clean out your Glamour Dresser.

Author: Sub07
Name: Flash When Cutscene Done
Description: Flash the game in taskbar when a cutscene ends and the game is unfocused.
Punchline: Flash the game in taskbar when a cutscene ends and the game is unfocused.

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Nicknamer
Description:
Lets you add a nickname to players in chat so you remember who they actually are or any other information you want to remember about them.
Supports different customization per person or global customization.
Punchline: Is this person Dew or Drew? I couldn't remember, so I made this plugin. Now I don't have to!

Author: Treezy
Name: Gearset Sort
Description: A cleaner interface to sort your gearsets that allows both swap/insert methods.
Punchline: Better Gearset Sorting

Author: Saevath
Name: CrystalRadio
Description: Listen to your favorite internet radio stations directly in-game. Browse stations and manage your favorites. Use /cradio to open the radio player
Punchline: Stream internet radio stations while playing FFXIV

Author: Mythic Palette
Name: Wordsmith
Description: Wordsmith 是一款考虑到角色扮演者的文本编辑器。 它会自动分解您的文本以便于复制/粘贴，具有高级功能、拼写检查，甚至是词库。
Punchline: 角色扮演词库和便签。

Author: Raytheon Vers
Name: Backseat Driver
Description: Backseat driver plugin.
Punchline: Easily get general and role-specific hints in duties.

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: XIV Instant Messenger
Description:
功能：
- 开启小窗聊天
- 每个窗口指向一名玩家
- 通过热键打开和查阅最近的聊天记录
- 直接向聊天窗发送情感动作指令，而不需要手动选中对方
- 自动将聊天记录保存到一个简单易读的文本文件
- 样式可高度自定义
Punchline: WIM(WoW Instant Messenger)风格的消息管理器。

Author: Lore
Name: TooltipNotes
Description: Right-click any item in your inventory to start adding a note,or make a label in the config window to start adding your own labels
Punchline: A Plugin that lets you add notes to item Tooltips

Author: Lynesth
Name: Better Targeting System
Description: A more intelligent targeting system for the game which also includes new keybinds.
Punchline: A more intelligent targeting system for the game.

Author: Mei
Name: Oh Hey!
Description: Ever wanted to get notified when someone targets you or emotes at you? Now you can !
Punchline: Ever wanted to get notified when someone targets you or emotes at you? Now you can!

Author: Zeffuro
Name: StatusTimers
Description: StatusTimers provides clear, customizable bars for tracking your crucial buffs and debuffs. It helps you keep an eye on active effects, their remaining durations, and stacks, allowing you to optimize your gameplay without constantly staring at your tiny icons.
Punchline: Before StatusTimers, my buffs/debuffs were a mystery. Now, it's a well-organized history!

Author: Sohtoren
Name: Altoholic
Description: Altoholic plugin
Punchline: Informations about your alts

Author: Infi, Sl0nderman, harbingerftw
Name: Blue Mage Helper
Description: Adds a window to show all Blue Magic, letting you search for spells and then teleport or mark the location on your map or open the dutyfinder. Can also mark mobs in world that drop spells you need.
Punchline: Helps you fill out your Blue Mage Spellbook

Author: MidoriKami
Name: HUDUnlimited
Description: Allows you to modify any and all individual elements of the user interface to allow you to customize it however you wish.
Punchline: Total control of your User Interface.

Author: The Redheaded Witch
Name: S Rank Assistant
Description: Auto counter for S Rank Summoning! Counts kills, gathering attempts, and even discarding items. Tracker is per zone so you can keep track of multiple locations at once. Even tracks the kills of others.
Punchline: I spent hours wokring hard coding so I could be lazy! Wouldn't you?'
Changelog: Fixed some minor bugs.

Author: mikelosx
Name: Shrinkage
Description:
This plugin will shrink and grow characters based on how much health they have, affects you and your party 

/shrinkage to open the config window.
Punchline: Shrinks characters based on their Health!

Author: rail
Name: Aether48
Description: Opens on death, or /a48. A 2048 clone mini-game. arrow keys or wasd
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A 2048 clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v1.0.0.3:api bump
v1.0.0.2: bug fixes, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.0.0.0: clean up
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

Author: 0x0ade
Name: CustomEqualizer
Description: Did you know that the EQ presets in the system settings are powered by a 4-band EQ? Let's make our own presets!
Punchline: Tweak the built-in 4-band EQ with custom presets.

Author: Tangy
Name: Lap Cat Counter
Description: Tracks lap sits per person.
Punchline: Counts how many laps you sit in :3

Author: Chirp + Bwuny
Name: Pathfinder
Description: A tool for visually locating any model path in the game world.
Punchline: Visualizer for nearby model paths. Adds +5 to perception.

Author: Enthusiastus
Name: AkuTrack
Description:
AkuTrack is a project to offer an improved ingame map enriched with information found by visiting on site.

This is achieved by collecting the data on a remote server once a user encounters it.

	- Adds NPC spawns to the map
	- Adds objects like Entrances and Exits
	- Adds Gathering Points independent of current job
Punchline: Shows an improved ingame (and outgame map) and collects the seen information to display later.

Author: rail
Name: AetherGon
Description: Opens on death, or /agon. A super hexagon clone mini-game.A/D or left right arrow
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A super hexagon clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v1.2.0.2:api v14.0.2
v1.2.0.1:code clean up, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.2.0.0: clean up assets
1.1.0.0: beat sequencer added
1.0.0.0: difficulty, settings and stuff
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

Author: iri
Name: Photobooth
Description:
Take your portrait & adventurer plate game to the next level with this companion panel for the portrait editor.

• Rewind, fast forward, and step through animations frame by frame.
• Adjust character head and eye direction without moving the camera.
• Position camera and pivot point with a top-down map.
• More intuitive controls for lighting color and angle.
Punchline: Advanced controls for portraits & adventurer plates.

Author: Lily
Name: BISBuddy
Description:
Highlights gear, coffers, and materia needed for all your gearsets. Imports directly from Etro or Xivgear for frictionless setup.

Highlights items needed for gearsets on:
    - Need/Greed Loot Windows
    - NPC Shops and Exchanges
    - Marketboard
    - Player Inventories
    - Item Tooltips

When melding materia, highlights:
    - Items to meld
    - Materia to meld to item

Automatically syncs gearsets with player inventory
Punchline: Gearing, streamlined.

Author: anqied
Name: Total Character Level
Description: Adds numbers to the Classes/Jobs panel showing the sum of the levels of all your jobs.
Punchline: Ever wanted to know how many levels you have across all your jobs?

Author: Teechep Bird
Name: FATE Helper
Description: Displays a list of all FATEs in the current area with: time remaining, percent completed, and bonus marker. Clicking on FATE name will flag it and teleport you, if flying isn't faster. Works with Eureka and Occult FATEs, and Bozja skirmishes. NOTE: this plugin does not track specific FATEs. You can add the Sonar plugin to track those.
Punchline: Makes FATEs suck slightly less, guaranteed! Disclaimer: atma drop rates will continue to suck.

Author: j0giwa
Name: ComfyLoot
Description: RuneLite inspired drop-tracker
Punchline: RuneLite inspired drop-tracker

Author: rail
Name: Aetherial Arena
Description: A collectable battling mini game
Punchline: Find and collect creatures to fight.

Author: The Redheaded Witch & WillWolf76
Name: Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder
Description:
This is the new and improved Fashion Report System. This plugin will allow you to open a window that will show you what your fashion report status is vs the current week's theme.

There are a few parts to this. Since the only way to get Fashion Report for the week to my knowledge is speaking to Masked Rose after Tuesdays reset, this plugin takes the first person who does talk to him and updates everyone else. So only one person per week needs to speak to Masked Rose.

You can click on a theme and pull all the known items for that theme for that specific slot. You also get a very detailed breakdown of how much points you are getting based on what you are currently wearing.

The plugin also stores the attempts of those using the mod (just the data from fashioncheck, no user information) so that we can figure out the dyes faster and share information faster. The information in this table is wiped every week since once we discover the dyes, it is useless.

I still have more upgrades to do, including adding a dye window and the window that will help calculate the weekly dyes. I already have an idea of how I want to write them, so it shouldn't take me too long. If you have suggestions on how I can upgrade this, please share with me on github!

Credit for the program goes to it's original creator, WillWolf76, who wrote this for me originally.

When this plugin updates the database, it also updates my Discord Bot which you can set up to post fashion report each week. It's set to update on Tuesdays and Fridays (week start and dye information added). Link to add the Discord Bot is in the about section.
Punchline: Know your Fashion Report points on the spot and help crowdsource new items and dyes!

- 总是发送到某个频道
- 更灵活的过滤
- RGB 通道着色

Punchline: Electric Boogaloo - 渲染全新的聊天窗口，全新的聊天窗口
Changelog:
**New Feature Added~**
- A web interface has been added
- *This will not function if your game client is offline or you are logged out of the game*

**Main Features**
- View in-game chat on any device that has a web browser functionality
- Can send chat messages through the web interface directly into the game itself
- Easily copy & paste messages
- Option for automatic starting the web interface feature
- Log lines render limit for faster loading performance [Default 1000]

**Security**
- This feature is not intended to be used outside of your local, private network
- Do not forward ports that are described inside the chat2 options panel
- Never share your authentication code under any circumstances
- Multi-box support is not provided, the web interface will track only the first client

**Additional Features soon to be Added**
- Display errors as small notifications inside the web interface

**Planned Features**
- Multiple Tabs support
- Browser specific settings
- Stylization support

**Additional Permissions Note**
- Users that wish to expand this to apps or other platforms are welcome to do so

*Note: An FAQ will be provided in the chat2 thread on the dalamud discord, linked in the About section*
